entities.name: INDO-GANGETIC PLAIN OF INDIA
entities.description: A region in India covering 44 million ha characterized by cereal-based cropping systems.

entities.name: CEREAL
entities.description: Predominant crop type in the Indo-Gangetic Plain.

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: A major cereal crop cultivated in the Indo-Gangetic Plain.

entities.description: A major cereal crop cultivated in the Indo-Gangetic Plain.

entities.name: LEGUMES
entities.description: Crops accounting for about 5 million ha in the Indo-Gangetic Plain.

entities.name: RAINFALL PATTERN
entities.description: Spatial variation in precipitation ranging from 268 mm to 1600 mm in the region.

entities.name: INCEPTISOL SOILS
entities.description: The dominant soil type in the Indo-Gangetic Plain.

entities.name: TEMPERATURE REGIME
entities.description: Agroclimatic characteristic varying across the region.

entities.name: EVAPOTRANSPIRATION
entities.description: Agroclimatic characteristic varying across the region.

entities.description: A major legume cultivated across the Indo-Gangetic Plain.

entities.description: A major legume cultivated across the Indo-Gangetic Plain.

entities.name: DISEASES
entities.description: Biotic constraints that severely limit legume production.
